name: com.useorgx/orgx-mcp
title: OrgX MCP - Agent Orchestration
description: Agent orchestration + org memory via MCP. Manage initiatives and decisions from any client.

tools.name: get_pending_decisions
tools.description: List OrgX decisions awaiting your approval. Use when the user asks what needs sign-off or wants to review pending/urgent decisions.

tools.name: approve_decision
tools.description: Approve a specific pending OrgX decision after the user confirms. Notifies the relevant agent.

tools.name: reject_decision
tools.description: Reject a pending OrgX decision with a reason after the user confirms. Use to request revisions.

tools.name: get_agent_status
tools.description: Show what OrgX agents are currently doing (running/idle), optionally for one agent.

tools.name: query_org_memory
tools.description: Search OrgX organizational memory (decisions, initiatives, artifacts) for a query. Use to find prior context or decisions.

tools.name: get_initiative_pulse
tools.description: Get health, milestones, blockers, and recent activity for a single initiative.

tools.name: spawn_agent_task
tools.description: Create a new task for a specialist OrgX agent. Use only when the user explicitly wants to assign work.

tools.name: get_decision_history
tools.description: Search past OrgX decisions related to a topic (optionally within an initiative).

tools.name: start_plan_session
tools.description: Start a new planning session to track your feature plan. Use this when beginning to plan a new feature.

tools.name: get_active_sessions
tools.description: Check for any active planning sessions you have open.

tools.name: improve_plan
tools.description: Get AI suggestions to improve your plan based on your past patterns and best practices.

tools.name: record_plan_edit
tools.description: Record an edit made to a plan. This helps learn your planning patterns.

tools.name: complete_plan
tools.description: Mark a plan as complete and record implementation details. Call this when done building.

tools.name: studio_brand_ingest
tools.description: Ingest brand sources and create/update a Content Studio brand pack.

tools.name: studio_content_create
tools.description: Generate branded visual content (carousel, post, story, video, banner, thumbnail).

tools.name: studio_library_search
tools.description: Search the Content Studio library by filters and text.

tools.name: studio_brands_list
tools.description: List available Content Studio brands for the user/org.

tools.name: get_org_snapshot
tools.description: Fetch organization snapshot. Compact summary by default; detailed mode supports explicit include filters and pagination.

tools.name: account_status
tools.description: Get current account tier, usage, and hourly MCP rate-limit status.

tools.name: account_upgrade
tools.description: Start a plan upgrade flow and return checkout/contact URL.

tools.name: account_usage_report
tools.description: Get detailed usage metrics and current edge rate-limit allowance.

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List entities of any type (initiative, task, milestone, agent, etc.) with pagination and filtering.

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: Create a new entity of any type (initiative, task, milestone, skill, etc.).

tools.name: batch_create_entities
tools.description: Create multiple entities in one call. Useful for initiative scaffolding without repeated tool invocations.

tools.name: scaffold_initiative
tools.description: Create an initiative with nested workstreams/milestones/tasks in a single call. Returns IDs and ref mappings.

tools.name: get_task_with_context
tools.description: Fetch a task plus its context attachments, optionally hydrating referenced entities/artifacts/plan sessions.

tools.name: update_entity
tools.description: Update an existing entity of any type. Only include fields you want to change.

tools.name: entity_action
tools.description: Launch, pause, complete, attach artifacts, or perform other actions on entities

tools.name: batch_delete_entities
tools.description: Delete multiple entities in one call using the 'delete' lifecycle action (hard delete).

tools.name: configure_org
tools.description: Check setup status, configure agents, or set org policies

tools.name: workspace
tools.description: List, get, or set workspace context

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get personal or session statistics

resources.name: Initiative
resources.description: Get full details of an OrgX initiative including milestones and tasks

resources.name: Decisions Widget
resources.description: Interactive widget for displaying and managing pending decisions

resources.name: Agent Status Widget
resources.description: Widget showing current agent status and activity

resources.name: Search Results Widget
resources.description: Widget for displaying organizational memory search results

resources.name: Initiative Pulse Widget
resources.description: Widget showing initiative health and progress metrics

resources.name: Test Minimal Widget
resources.description: Minimal self-contained widget used to verify MCP Apps rendering

resources.name: Decisions Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK widget for displaying and managing pending decisions

resources.name: Agent Status Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK widget showing current agent status and activity

resources.name: Search Results Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK widget for displaying organizational memory search results

resources.name: Initiative Pulse Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK widget showing initiative health and progress metrics

resources.name: Task Spawned Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK widget confirming agent task assignment

resources.name: Test Minimal Widget (Skybridge)
resources.description: ChatGPT Apps SDK minimal widget used to verify widget rendering

prompts.name: create-roadmap
prompts.description: Create an initiative plus supporting milestones and tasks

prompts.name: plan_feature
prompts.description: Plan a feature with automatic improvement suggestions and pattern learning

prompts.name: get_my_patterns
prompts.description: Discover your learned planning patterns and skills

prompts.name: thursday-e2e
prompts.description: E2E run: agent loop + MCP Apps widgets + context survival (real data)
